mesures.details: Draft and distribute the ISP covering the entire IoMT scope, including MDR and HDS requirements. Annual management review. Includes security objectives, roles and responsibilities, and ISS governance.

mesures.description: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Plan (BCP/DRP)
mesures.details: Document continuity procedures for the telemonitoring platform and IoMT devices. Includes RTO/RPO per service, cloud failover procedures, and crisis communication. Semi-annual testing.
Quarterly program for all staff: e-learning, simulated phishing, IoMT workshops. Specific developer training (OWASP, secure firmware coding). Completion rate tracking.
CyberArk bastion for all admin access to AWS, Azure IoT Hub and infrastructure. Recorded sessions, mandatory MFA, Just-In-Time access via Azure PIM. Monthly privileged account review.

mesures.description: Health Data Encryption at Rest and in Transit
mesures.details: AES-256 for patient data at rest (RDS PostgreSQL, S3). TLS 1.3 for all IoMT traffic (MQTT over TLS), REST APIs and internal communications. Key management via AWS KMS with automatic annual rotation.
Elastic SIEM centralizing AWS CloudTrail, Azure AD, IoT Hub, firewall and endpoint logs. SIGMA rule correlation. Outsourced SOC with SLA: P1 <15min, P2 <1h. Monthly activity reports.
Annual pentest on cloud infrastructure + IoMT platform by PASSI-certified firm. Monthly vulnerability scans (Qualys). Quarterly firmware fuzzing. Remediation tracking with SLA.

Patch management process: critical <48h, high <7d, medium <30d. Qualys dashboard with coverage metrics. Documented exceptions validated by CISO. Applicable to infrastructure, workstations and firmware.
4-level classification policy (Public, Internal, Confidential, Medical Secret). Azure Information Protection automatic labeling for health data. Microsoft 365 DLP enabled on email and SharePoint.
Quarterly access review campaign on Azure AD, AWS IAM, IoT Hub and business applications. Manager validation. Automatic deactivation of inactive accounts >90 days.

mesures.description: Network Segmentation and Zero Trust Architecture
mesures.details: AWS VPC micro-segmentation (subnets per environment), dedicated IoT VLAN, DMZ for public APIs. Zero Trust architecture: systematic identity + posture verification before access. CloudFront WAF on public endpoints.
SonarQube SAST and Snyk in GitLab CI/CD pipeline. Automated DAST on APIs. STRIDE threat modeling for each major firmware release. Mandatory security code review. Automatic SBOM generation.

NIS2 art. 23 compliant process: detection, qualification (P1-P4), containment, eradication, recovery, lessons learned. ANSSI notification <24h for significant incidents. CNIL notification <72h if personal data. Annual crisis exercise.

Annual security questionnaire based on CAIQ/CSA for critical vendors (AWS, Microsoft, GitLab, component suppliers). Risk scoring, corrective action plan, contractual audit clause. Subcontractor register maintained.
Daily RDS backups with 30-day retention, S3 versioning with Object Lock (immutability). Cross-region replication for DRP. Quarterly restoration tests documented with RTO measurement.
Mandatory Entra ID MFA for all cloud and VPN access. Conditional access policies (location, device compliance). Unified SSO for all SaaS applications. ANSSI-compliant password policy.
Centralization of all logs (infrastructure, applications, IoT) in Elastic. 12-month retention. Log integrity guaranteed by hashing. Automatic alerts on critical security events.
Automated IT asset inventory (ServiceNow CMDB). Monthly network discovery. Classification by business criticality. IoMT component lifecycle and obsolescence tracking.
CrowdStrike Falcon deployed on all workstations and servers. Behavioral EDR detection. USB blocking policy. Email attachment sandboxing via Defender for Office 365.
Badge access control for premises. Video surveillance of sensitive areas (server room). Air conditioning and UPS for on-premise infrastructure. Secure media destruction procedure.

mesures.description: GDPR Compliance and Personal Data Protection
mesures.details: Up-to-date processing register. DPIA completed for telemonitoring. Standard contractual clauses with subcontractors. Data subject rights exercise procedure. Designated DPO.
ITIL change management process: weekly CAB, systematic security impact assessment, documented rollback. Emergency changes with post-hoc CISO validation within 48h.
Hardware component integrity verification (SBOM). Security audit of electronic component suppliers. Provenance control and traceability. Supply chain alert monitoring.
MQTT and BLE traffic monitoring for IoMT devices. Behavioral anomaly detection (volumetry, atypical schedules). Real-time alerts to SOC. Dedicated IoT dashboard.
Cryptographically signed firmware updates (code signing). Secure OTA distribution with device-side integrity verification. Automatic rollback on failure. Accelerated critical patch validation.

preuves.label: Encryption Audit Report
preuves.commentaire: AES-256 and TLS 1.3 compliance validated on all flows

preuves.label: Annual Pentest Report 2026
preuves.commentaire: 3 critical fixed, 0 remaining. Scope: cloud + IoMT

preuves.label: Incident Management Procedure v2.1
preuves.commentaire: NIS2 art. 23 compliant. Tested during 02/2026 crisis exercise

preuves.label: ISO 27001 Internal Audit Report
preuves.commentaire: 12 minor non-conformities, 0 major. Certification audit planned Q3 2026

preuves.commentaire: SOC 2 Type I audit planned Q4 2026
